title: Caldera/OpenAEV - Transfer Data to Cloud Account via OCI Object Storage
description: Detects bulk data upload to OCI Object Storage as part of exfiltration to a cloud account. OpenAEV/Caldera T1537 emulation copies staged files to an OCI bucket that may be attacker-controlled or pre-authenticated for external access. Triggers on PutObject API calls following unusual IAM session activity.
falsepositives: Authorized application backup jobs writing to OCI Object Storage
Data pipeline ETL processes writing output files
